name: setup-notifyer
tagline: Authenticate and configure a Notifyer WhatsApp workspace
description: Create and manage a Notifyer by WhatsAble account — signup, login, check WhatsApp connection status, manage team members, assign roles, configure workspace labels, and retrieve the Developer API key. Use this skill any time you need to authenticate against the Notifyer Console API, set up a new workspace, or prepare the environment before running automate-notifyer or chat-notifyer.
author: whatsable

env.name: NOTIFYER_API_BASE_URL
env.description: Base URL for the Notifyer API (e.g. https://api.insightssystem.com)

env.name: NOTIFYER_API_TOKEN
env.description: JWT token obtained from login.js. Required for all API calls.
